title: Is Brownie-batter Gluten Free? | BiteRight
description: Public gluten safety analysis for Brownie-batter. See major risks, safer alternatives, and what to ask before ordering.
heading: Is Brownie-batter gluten free?
intro: This public analysis report explains the biggest gluten risks in Brownie-batter and how to order more safely.

verdict.summary: Brownie batter may contain gluten due to the use of wheat flour and cross-contamination risks during preparation. Care should be taken to ensure all ingredients are gluten-free and prepared in a dedicated space.

disclaimer: This guidance is informational only. Always verify ingredients and preparation with the restaurant.

sections.title: Quick answer
sections.body: Brownie-batter can vary by recipe, ingredients, and cross-contact controls in the kitchen.

sections.title: Common gluten risks
sections.body: Watch for hidden sources like soy sauce, malt flavoring, marinades, thickeners, and shared fryers.

sections.title: How BiteRight helps
sections.body: Scan menus and ingredient labels with BiteRight to get a localized gluten-risk breakdown in seconds.

waiter_script.preview: Can you confirm that the brownie batter is made with gluten-free ingredients and prepared in a gluten-free area?

faq.question: Can BiteRight confirm if Brownie-batter is gluten free?
faq.answer: BiteRight highlights likely gluten risks based on ingredients and preparation. Always confirm with the kitchen if you have coeliac disease.

faq.question: What should I ask a restaurant?
faq.answer: Ask about shared equipment, sauces, marinades, and whether the kitchen has a dedicated gluten-free prep area.
